PROOF OF SERVICE OF MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANTS CATHERINE GALLAGHER & WILLIAM GALLAGHER, D.D.S.'S FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 15, 2013 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY SHALL DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS BY JUNE 21, 2013 AT 4:00 PM TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR # 6185
